# vastdata_database_schema (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `database_name` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `guid` (String) A unique guid given to the databse
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `identifier` (String) A computed identifier of the table
